title: Actor
description: An institution or individual that appears in the analysis. Migrated from content/auckland/schema/actor.schema.json. Structural changes: (1) governs_ids added (E_governs, Actor → Region); (2) Actor is excluded from E_evidenced_by (§2 — existence-claims about actors are Source-referenced; contested claims live as Claim nodes *about* the Actor, not as edges from Actor into Claim). Type enum is actor_institutional_typology_v1 (11-value, ratified 2026-04-25).

roles.description: Freetext role labels for this Actor (e.g. 'regulator', 'funder', 'service-provider').

governs_ids.description: Regions this Actor has jurisdictional responsibility over. Materialises to E_governs.

source_ids.description: Sources for this Actor's definition (e.g. official mandate documents, legislation). Direct citation permitted on Actor for definitional provenance.
